chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C. P. No. D — 2510 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[S] 18.05.2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Haji Qalandar Bux Leghari Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Fayyaz Ahmed Leghari Advocate for respondent. ----- Petitioner intends to exhaust the remedy before a forum having jurisdiction as no fundamental right claimed to have been violated. The petitioner was compulsorily retired and in consequence whereof this petition was filed. When asked about the maintainability of this petition on the count that no statutory rules are being maintained, learned counsel has conceded that he would exhaust remedy available to him under the law and the delay as consumed in this petition may be condoned. We are afraid we cannot pass such order as far as condonation of delay is concerned, however, in case such remedy is attempted to be exhausted he may move an appropriate application under Limitation Act which may be looked into in accordance with law. The petition is accordingly dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A
